LOCATOR.TITLE: Find Members
LOCATOR.NO_HOME: Select a home to find its members.
LOCATOR.MEMBERS_EMPTY: No home members are here yet. Ask them to open this page and share their location.

CONNECTION.ERROR: Lost connection to live updates. Retrying… check your network.

LOCATION.FIX_SETTINGS: How to fix browser location settings

HELP_STEPS.IOS_SERVICES: iOS: Settings → Privacy & Security → Location Services → enable for your browser (Safari / Chrome) with Precise Location on.
HELP_STEPS.IOS_SAFARI: iOS Safari (per site): tap "AA" in the URL bar → Website Settings → Location → Allow.
HELP_STEPS.DESKTOP_CHROME: Desktop Chrome / Edge: click the lock icon next to the URL → Site settings → Location → Allow.
HELP_STEPS.DESKTOP_SAFARI: Desktop Safari: Safari → Settings → Websites → Location → set this site to Allow.
HELP_STEPS.RELOAD: Reload the page after changing the setting.
